# Django Cotton VS Code Extension

This workspace contains a VS Code extension for Django Cotton - a component-based template system for Django.

## Project Overview
- Extension provides syntax highlighting for Cotton templates
- Autocompletion for Cotton components and attributes  
- Developer tools for Cotton template development
- Built with TypeScript and VS Code Extension API

## Development Instructions
- Use TypeScript for all extension code
- Follow VS Code extension best practices
- Test extension functionality thoroughly
- Maintain compatibility with Django Cotton syntax
